name: kopo
title: Kopo
description: Rephrase the selected text with Claude or ChatGPT (via Raycast Pro)
author: ioseb

preferences.name: oauthToken
preferences.title: Claude Token
preferences.description: Run `claude setup-token` in a terminal and paste the token here (uses your Claude subscription, no API key).

preferences.name: claudePath
preferences.title: Claude CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the `claude` binary (Claude Code), signed in with your subscription. Run `which claude` to find it.

commands.name: kopo
commands.title: Kopo – Presets
commands.description: Manage rephrase presets and run them on the selected text

commands.name: slot-1
commands.title: Kopo Slot 1
commands.description: Rephrase the selection with preset #1 (assign a hotkey to this)

commands.name: slot-2
commands.title: Kopo Slot 2
commands.description: Rephrase the selection with preset #2 (assign a hotkey to this)

commands.name: slot-3
commands.title: Kopo Slot 3
commands.description: Rephrase the selection with preset #3 (assign a hotkey to this)

commands.name: slot-4
commands.title: Kopo Slot 4
commands.description: Rephrase the selection with preset #4 (assign a hotkey to this)

commands.name: slot-5
commands.title: Kopo Slot 5
commands.description: Rephrase the selection with preset #5 (assign a hotkey to this)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
